name: raincheck
description: RainCheck — AI-Powered Parametric Insurance for Food Delivery Partners

scripts.postinstall: cd client && npm install && cd ../server && npm install
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev:client" "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:ml"
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd client && npm install && cd ../server && npm install
scripts.build: cd client && npm run build && cd ../server && npm run build

author: CEIL
